recommendations.title: The Longest Ride
recommendations.overview: The lives of a young couple intertwine with a much older man as he reflects back on a lost love while he's trapped in an automobile crash.

recommendations.title: The Hate U Give

recommendations.title: Faster
recommendations.overview: After 10 years in prison, Driver is now a free man with a single focus - hunting down the people responsible for brutally murdering his brother.

recommendations.title: Biggie: I Got a Story to Tell

recommendations.title: Frances
recommendations.overview: The true story of Frances Farmer's meteoric rise to fame in Hollywood and the tragic turn her life took when she was blacklisted.

recommendations.title: Latin Blood – The Ballad of Ney Matogrosso
recommendations.overview: From a repressive childhood to artistic revolution, Ney Matogrosso transforms Brazil's stages — and himself — through music, creativity and inner fire.

recommendations.title: Straight Outta Compton
